sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114521" key="xorto/strwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χορτό-στρωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n114521.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">litter of grass</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hay,</tr_> ibid.; <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χορτό-στρωτοι</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στιβάδες</foreign> ib.</sense> </entryFree>
